case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS MCMALLOW JON E DBA THE PRODUCE MART INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $705.35 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT MCMALLOW JON E DBA THE PRODUCE MART INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
